Purview._comment: Provide YOUR values here, in appsettings.Local.json (git-ignored), or via env vars (TenantId, Purview__AppLocationValue, Purview__DefaultUserObjectId, Purview__ClientId/ClientSecret). Empty values are fine: the agent runs and uses the regex SIT classifier. ForgedScholarTwo is app-perm, so DefaultUserObjectId should be a sponsor/admin OID for Purview attribution.
